{{Infobox technique
| name = The Stone Anchor
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Stone Anchor refers to two distinct concepts within the narrative. Primarily, it is a full-body [[Enforcer technique]] utilized by characters such as [[Ziel]] and [[Lindon]]. When activated, this technique uses [[force madra]] to reinforce the user's body, providing stability and [[binding]] them firmly to the ground. This allows a practitioner to maintain their footing against heavy impacts or to brace themselves while delivering powerful strikes with weapons like hammers. Conversely, the term also describes a physical teleportation anchor. This is a scripted stone spike or object used to mark a specific location, serving as a target for gatekeys to guide travelers to a destination.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Stone Anchor]] is [[Ziel]]'s full-body [[Enforcer technique]] that binds him to the ground.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Stone Anchor]] is used by [[Ziel]] to carry his heavy weapons.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Stone Anchor]] is an [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Stone Anchor]] is an ability or tool used by [[Ziel]] to hold things down.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]] uses the Stone Anchor.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Stone Anchor is an [[Enforcer technique]] that allows the user to keep their feet.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
